checks.description: Gas detectors calibrated within last 90 days
No gas detectors in bypass/bypass logged
Alarm response time < 60 seconds (drilled quarterly)
Audible and visual alarms functional in all zones
Gas detector coverage meets zone hazard classification requirements
Emergency shutdown interface tested (monthly)
Gas detector data logged and reviewable for 90 days
All high-risk permits reviewed by safety officer
Permit validity period does not exceed shift duration
Atmospheric test results attached to confined space permits
SIMOPS review conducted for overlapping permits in same zone
Permit closure includes post-work inspection sign-off
Worker training/certification verified before permit issuance
Emergency contact numbers listed on all permits
LOTO procedure followed for all maintenance work
Equipment isolation verified by second qualified person
Maintenance procedures include hazard identification step
Spare parts and tools inspected before use
Post-maintenance testing completed before return to service
Maintenance records updated within 24 hours
All workers have current safety training certifications
Emergency response drills conducted quarterly
Permit issuers trained and authorized
First aid trained personnel available on every shift
Confined space rescue team trained bi-annually
New worker safety induction completed before site access
Emergency evacuation plan posted in all zones
Assembly points clearly marked and maintained
Fire extinguishers inspected monthly
Emergency lighting tested weekly
Fire water system flow tested quarterly
Emergency communication systems tested weekly
Mutual aid agreements with neighboring plants current
